address.Address: A- Block, Naraina Vihar, New Delhi, Delhi 110028

address.streetAddress: A- Block, Naraina Vihar, New Delhi, Delhi 110028

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I'm thrilled to share my amazing experience with Salwan Junior School. The school has exceeded all my expectations, and I'm so grateful to have had the opportunity to be a part of this incredible community.

The teachers at Salwan Junior School are truly exceptional - capable, compassionate, and dedicated to their students' growth and well-being. They go above and beyond to ensure that each child receives the best possible education and care. Their patience, kindness, and understanding create a nurturing environment that allows students to thrive.

The school's emphasis on holistic development is evident in the various extracurricular activities and events organized throughout the year. From sports and arts to cultural festivals and community service, there's something for every child to explore and excel in.

The infrastructure is modern, clean, and well-maintained, providing a safe and comfortable learning space for students. The classrooms are equipped with innovative technology, making learning fun and engaging.

What truly sets Salwan Junior School apart is its strong sense of community. The teachers, staff, and parents work together to create a supportive and inclusive environment that fosters lifelong friendships and memories.

I'm so grateful to be a part of this wonderful school, and I highly recommend it to parents seeking a well-rounded education for their child. Kudos to the Salwan Junior School team for creating a truly special place for young minds to grow and flourish!

I would like to enlighten the positive aspects of being a salwanian. My son is associated with this school since nursery, it is been seven years and being a parent I am so proud for part of this wonderful journey.. it's not just school for me or my son it's more like a true family..All the teachers, staff and adminstration is excellent not in their respective fields but they all are kind and warm hearted person..Till now my son has groomed into a wonderful personality with good behaviour, academically and in social conduct. It's all because of excellent teachers and their cooperation and positive feedback time to time .
I am blessed and thankful to almighty for giving me chance to be part of this wonderful school and meeting with such lovely personalities..
Thank you 
Harneet Johar
(A proud parent)

My child A.Rehan studied at Salwan Junior School, and our overall experience has been very positive. From the very first day, I felt that the school provided a warm and caring environment where my child felt safe and happy.
The teachers are patient, supportive, and genuinely concerned about each child’s progress. They take the time to explain concepts clearly and always keep parents informed about how the child is doing. I noticed a big improvement in my child’s confidence, communication skills, and overall behaviour.
The school also gives equal importance to co-curricular activities. My child enjoyed sports, art, and various class events that helped develop creativity and teamwork. These activities made school life exciting and helped my child discover new interests.
I also appreciate the school’s focus on discipline and safety. The staff members are attentive, and the atmosphere is structured yet friendly. Communication with parents is smooth, with regular updates, meetings, and feedback.
Overall, I am very satisfied with the experience. Salwan Junior School has played an important role in shaping my child’s early years, and I would happily recommend it to other parents looking for a balanced, nurturing, and academically strong school.

I studied at Salwan Junior School right from Nursery, with countless beautiful memories and valuable lessons. The teachers are extremely humble and supportive , their teaching not only focuses on academics but also on overall development of the child through co-scholastic and counselling support. The wide range of activities like dance, music, sports, and computer sciences helped me grow both mentally and physically. Studying at Salwan was truly one of the best experiences of my life, and I’ll always feel proud to be a part of the Salwan family. ✨

Salwan Junior School offers an exceptional learning atmosphere where children thrive academically and personally. The faculty is highly educated, experienced, and genuinely committed to nurturing every child’s potential. The school blends strong academics with values, confidence, and creativity, making it a truly enriching place for young learners.
A wonderful learning environment with dedicated teachers and modern facilities .

School provides ample opportunity for students to learn and grow. From outdoor visits to participation in National and International event, students get enough exposure for learning beyond classroom. Recent initiatives in terms of infrastructure development- AC classrooms, AC buses, NEP ready classrooms, Colourful play area, mid-day meal, personalised laptops for digital learning has added immense value for money.

My ward has been studying in this school since nursery & we found it incredibly awesome. Talking about culture, curriculum, study patterns etc everything is indeed praiseworthy. Behavioral patterns of teachers along with the staff are really appreciated. The way teachers & principal ma'am co-operate with students & always motivate towards their improvements. School always involves their students in various activities like brain storming activities, confidence building activities, take them to the national level as well as school levels competitions. Being parents, we are extremely happy that our kid is in the goods hands & really happy being a part of the Salwanian family.👍😊

As a parent, I want to express my heartfelt gratitude to the school, teachers, and everyone involved in making the Annual Day such a grand success. The event was beautifully organized,  all the hard work could be seen in each and every performance and the students equally contributed in executing their roles with great confidence and enthusiasm, which reflects the dedication and guidance of their teachers.

A big thank you to the organizers and support staff for ensuring everything ran smoothly. It was a memorable and enriching experience. Your efforts are truly appreciated!
As parents we are happy with the teaching method and school staff, however do not like Saturday working for primary school.
